channel.title: Posts on Josue Kouka
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on josuebrunel.github.io

item.title: Building PulseDash — Replacing a Dead Wearable's Apps
item.description: How I reverse-engineered the BLE protocol and built an open-source companion app for the Pulse Series One after the manufacturer disappeared.

item.title: My SaaS Tech Stack: Chosen by an Engineer Who Likes Simplicity
item.description: Why my SaaS uses a boring, simple tech stack—and why that’s exactly what makes it scalable.
